title: T-057 — Warehouse readiness validator and prototype label guard
prompt:
# T-057 — Warehouse readiness validator and prototype label guard

PRD: `docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Harden readiness validation so coverage, manifest, prototype labels, ACP task shape, and cross-module dependencies stay in sync.

## Implementation contract
Extend the local readiness validator or add a companion guard that verifies manifest count, coverage rows, task IDs, T3/T4 prototype AC, first-class WH-015/WH-017 labels, WH-109 Phase 1 coverage, M-12 canonical label, and cross_module_dependencies metadata.

## Files (scope)
- _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse/_validate.py [modify]
- _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse/coverage.md
- _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse/manifest.json
- _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-warehouse.json
- _meta/prototype-labels/master-index.json

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse/_validate.py runs, then it passes only when manifest task_count matches files, coverage.md includes WH-001..WH-020, M-05..M-15, WH-101..WH-109, and all P1 gaps are resolved or explicitly Phase 2.
2. Given T3-ui tasks reference prototype files, then acceptance criteria include design/Monopilot Design System paths and data-prototype-label marker requirements.
3. Given prototype indexes are checked, then available_lp_picker, wo_reservations_panel, use_by_override_modal, shelf_life_rules_admin_page, and shelf_life_rule_edit_modal are present with status metadata.
4. Given task JSON is inspected, then pipeline_inputs.cross_module_dependencies exists on Warehouse tasks that touch Settings, Technical, Planning, Scanner, Production, Quality, or Shipping contracts.

## Test strategy
- RED: add fixture check that fails on missing WH-109, M-12, WH-015, or WH-017 labels.
- GREEN: run python3 _validate.py from _meta/atomic-tasks/05-warehouse and git diff --check.
- Run python3 scripts/check_warehouse_readiness.py if a companion script is added.

## Risk red lines
- Do not loosen ACP TaskCreate top-level schema.
- Do not mark P1 unresolved gaps as pass without explicit user decision.
- Do not require P2 surfaces to have P1 implementation tasks.

cross_module_dependencies.contract: rule_registry, warehouses/locations/printers, feature flags, tenant security policy
PO/TO/WO read models, RM root reservations, WO release/cancel hooks
LP lookup, barcode validation, lock protocol, FEFO suggestion, consume-to-WO
WO material consumption and output LP creation events
